description_long: This is a decorative, ornate vase with a tall, slender neck and a bulbous body, featuring a curved handle and a long, narrow spout. The surface is richly adorned with colorful floral motifs in red, blue, green, and yellow, set against a white background. The base is wide and circular, providing stability, and is also decorated with a dense pattern of small, multicolored dots. The lid is pointed and fits snugly atop the neck, echoing the floral and geometric designs seen on the body. The handle is robust and dark, contrasting with the lighter, more colorful body, while the spout is textured and slightly curved. The overall appearance suggests a hand-painted ceramic or porcelain construction, typical of traditional Middle Eastern or South Asian decorative arts.
description: A colorful, ornate vase with a bulbous body, tall neck, curved handle, and long spout, richly decorated with floral motifs and geometric patterns.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from the front, highlighting the curved handle on the left and the long, textured spout on the right, with the floral patterns and pointed lid clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view centers the spout, showing its full length and curvature, while the handle is partially obscured behind the body.
description_view_2: The handle is now on the right, with the spout extending to the left, offering a clear view of the bulbous body and the intricate floral designs.
description_view_3: The back of the vase is visible, with the handle fully in view and the spout mostly hidden, emphasizing the continuous decorative pattern around the body.
